_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Assist in the development of individual/collective development, training, and/or remediation plans.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge sharing forums, best practice documentation, cross-team collaboration initiatives, and capability building activities.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-S-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-004 (OP, cosine: 0.482), LS-S-009 (LS, cosine: 0.467).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.466). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [assist, collective, development, individual, plans, remediation] vs WIDAI-only terms [activities, ai, best, building, capability, collaboration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.861 (P=0.865, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "Assist in the development of individual/collective development, training, and/or" and "Skill in facilitating data and AI communities of practice, including knowledge s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 ≈ STS 0.466 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [assist, collective, development, individual, plans, remediation]. WIDAI terms: [activities, ai, best, building, capability, collaboration].
